# Ram Janki Palace - Wedding Venue Website

## Project Setup Progress

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project

- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project

## Project Details
- **Type**: Next.js 14+ with TypeScript
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Animations**: Framer Motion
- **Theme**: Indian Wedding Venue (Maroon, Gold, Red, Cream)
- **Features**: Single-page website, mobile-first, light/dark mode, SEO optimized

## Completed Setup
✅ All components created with Framer Motion animations
✅ Tailwind CSS configured with custom Indian wedding theme
✅ Light/Dark mode toggle with localStorage
✅ SEO metadata configured
✅ Floating WhatsApp button
✅ Services section with clickable modals
✅ Image gallery with lightbox
✅ Responsive design (mobile-first)
✅ Dependencies installed

## Next Steps
1. Add images from Google Drive to `public/images/` (see IMAGE_SETUP.md)
2. Run `npm run dev` to start development server
3. Visit http://localhost:3000 to view the website
